extra.reason: Done: Groups view now marks only live-model non-qualifying third-place rows with an accessible Out cue. Validation: npm test; static mirror check; Playwright desktop/mobile DOM and screenshot checks.

Done: Third-place ranking rank badges now use neutral styling while group standings keep rank colors. Validation: npm test; git diff --check; static mirror check; Playwright desktop/mobile rendered style checks.

Done: Group card headers no longer show the fixed team-count label while group titles remain visible in all-groups and filtered views. Validation: npm test; git diff --check; static mirror check; Playwright desktop/mobile Groups tab checks.

Done: prediction fixture cards no longer render source chips while group/time metadata and prediction source behavior remain intact. Validation: npm test, git diff --check, static mirror check, Playwright desktop/mobile rendered checks.

Done: prediction summaries now render concise scorelines, draws stay explicit, and pending states remain unchanged. Validation: npm test, git diff --check, static export mirror check, Playwright desktop/mobile rendered checks.

Done: removed the redundant successful local/static tournament data loaded status while preserving meaningful refresh, odds, and error statuses. Validation: npm test; git diff --check; node --check public/app.js docs/app.js scripts/export-static-site.js; static mirror check; Playwright desktop/mobile static rendered checks and targeted status/error checks.
